title: rungia paxiana
intro: Rungia paxiana, also known as the Himalayan Rungia, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rungia paxiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
